title: Musk Ally Gracias Stands to Make Billions Off SpaceX
description: Antonio Gracias, the founder of Valor Equity Partners and a longtime Elon Musk ally, controls a 7.3% stake in SpaceX, making him the second-largest holder after Musk himself that will earn the investor a giant windfall.

title: SpaceX Filing Reveals $4.28 Billion Loss, Musk’s Tight Grip
description: SpaceX filed publicly for what stands to be the largest-ever initial public offering, revealing billions in losses and the super-voting share plan allowing Elon Musk to keep the rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence giant under his control.

title: OpenAI Faces IPO Unknowns Even After Victory Over Elon Musk
description: Elon Musk’s legal battle against OpenAI has hung over the ChatGPT maker for more than two years, threatening to unravel its restructuring as a for-profit business and undermine its plans to go public.
